title: PSEB 10th Result 2026 Live: PSEB 10th results releasing shortly at pseb.ac.in, direct link to check here
description: PSEB 10th Result 2026 Live: PSEB 10th results will be declared at 12.30 pm on May 11, 2026. The direct link to check the Class 10 results will be available on pseb.ac.in. Follow the blog for latest updates.
